'''鈭歾-n-zh''' ('''kazanazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulsate|pulsate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulsate|pulsate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-n-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kazanazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizanazh|thizanazh]] || [[word:jizanazh|jizanazh]] || [[word:shizanazh|shizanazh]] || [[word:kizanazh|kizanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzanazh|thuthuzanazh]] || [[word:jujuzanazh|jujuzanazh]] || [[word:shushuzanazh|shushuzanazh]] || [[word:kukuzanazh|kukuzanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzanazh|thuzanazh]] || [[word:juzanazh|juzanazh]] || [[word:shuzanazh|shuzanazh]] || [[word:kuzanazh|kuzanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzanazh|thuzanazh]] || [[word:juzanazh|juzanazh]] || [[word:shuzanazh|shuzanazh]] || [[word:kuzanazh|kuzanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezanazh|thezanazh]] || [[word:jezanazh|jezanazh]] || [[word:shezanazh|shezanazh]] || [[word:kezanazh|kezanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozanazh|thothozanazh]] || [[word:jojozanazh|jojozanazh]] || [[word:shoshozanazh|shoshozanazh]] || [[word:kokozanazh|kokozanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozanazh|thozanazh]] || [[word:jozanazh|jozanazh]] || [[word:shozanazh|shozanazh]] || [[word:kozanazh|kozanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozanazh|thozanazh]] || [[word:jozanazh|jozanazh]] || [[word:shozanazh|shozanazh]] || [[word:kozanazh|kozanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zanazh|th忙zanazh]] || [[word:j忙zanazh|j忙zanazh]] || [[word:sh忙zanazh|sh忙zanazh]] || [[word:k忙zanazh|k忙zanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazanazh|thathazanazh]] || [[word:jajazanazh|jajazanazh]] || [[word:shashazanazh|shashazanazh]] || [[word:kakazanazh|kakazanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazanazh|thazanazh]] || [[word:jazanazh|jazanazh]] || [[word:shazanazh|shazanazh]] || [[word:kazanazh|kazanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazanazh|thazanazh]] || [[word:jazanazh|jazanazh]] || [[word:shazanazh|shazanazh]] || [[word:kazanazh|kazanazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazanazh|shazanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazanazh|goshazanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazanazh|gokishazanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazanazhn眉|shazanazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkn眉|goshazanazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazanazhn眉|gokishazanazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazanazhsh毛|shazanazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazanazhnksh毛|goshazanazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazanazhsh毛|gokishazanazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazanazhro|shazanazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkro|goshazanazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazanazhro|gokishazanazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazanazhmu|shazanazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkmu|goshazanazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazanazhmu|gokishazanazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazanazhsher|shazanazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazanazhnksher|goshazanazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazanazhsher|gokishazanazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazanazhng|shazanazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkng|goshazanazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazanazhng|gokishazanazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazanazhya|shazanazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkya|goshazanazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazanazhya|gokishazanazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazanazhyam|shazanazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkyam|goshazanazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazanazhyam|gokishazanazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazanazhn眉sh毛|shazanazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkn眉sh毛|goshazanazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazanazhn眉sh毛|gokishazanazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazanazhn眉ro|shazanazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkn眉ro|goshazanazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazanazhn眉ro|gokishazanazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazanazhn眉mu|shazanazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkn眉mu|goshazanazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazanazhn眉mu|gokishazanazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazanazhsh毛n眉|shazanazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazanazhnksh毛n眉|goshazanazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazanazhsh毛n眉|gokishazanazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazanazhsh毛ro|shazanazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazanazhnksh毛ro|goshazanazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazanazhsh毛ro|gokishazanazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazanazhsh毛mu|shazanazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazanazhnksh毛mu|goshazanazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazanazhsh毛mu|gokishazanazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazanazhron眉|shazanazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkron眉|goshazanazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazanazhron眉|gokishazanazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazanazhrosh毛|shazanazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkrosh毛|goshazanazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazanazhrosh毛|gokishazanazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazanazhromu|shazanazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkromu|goshazanazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazanazhromu|gokishazanazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazanazhmun眉|shazanazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkmun眉|goshazanazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazanazhmun眉|gokishazanazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazanazhmush毛|shazanazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkmush毛|goshazanazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazanazhmush毛|gokishazanazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazanazhmuro|shazanazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazanazhnkmuro|goshazanazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazanazhmuro|gokishazanazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|2edd495}}
